prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document pertains to the regulatory judgement of Golden Lane Housing Limited, which operates across the UK. However, social housing regulation and governance standards differ in Scotland, which has its own framework and regulatory body. Therefore, this specific regulatory judgement does not apply to Scotland.
